text: // import Scanner object public class UserInput1 { public static void main(String[] args) { // Open a Scanner object to get keyboard input int age; String name; System.out.print( '"What is your full name: "' ); name = input.nextLine(); / reads in a String System.out.print( ""How old are you: ' ); age = inEuLnexlInl(); // reads in an integer System.out.print( ""Well, " + name); Sysdm.out.printIn( ", yon are ' + age + ' years old." ); } Y
